identifying_variation: origin-country work and fertility proxies among descendants in a common host setting
identifies: inherited culture and transmitted role norms
diagnostic_caution: Identifies transmission proxies, not current sanctions by peers or family.

identifying_variation: historical agricultural technology predicts modern role norms
diagnostic_caution: Historical proxies can bundle technology, institutions, ecology, and selection.

identifying_variation: job advertisement randomly varies competitive compensation or framing
diagnostic_caution: Identifies response to the randomized entry environment, not the full norm system.

identifying_variation: information or recruitment changes entry into gender-coded occupations
diagnostic_caution: Identifies response to the randomized entry environment, not the full norm system.

identifying_variation: reputation-preserving conduct changes public work or mobility choices
diagnostic_caution: Separate religious conduct and reputation from legal exclusion, safety, and household constraints.

identifying_variation: informal interaction with managers affects promotion opportunities
diagnostic_caution: Separate chosen networking conduct from structural access to networks and managers.

identifying_variation: local unemployment changes the social cost of nonemployment
identifies: current local work or unemployment norms
diagnostic_caution: Local social pressure can be correlated with labor demand, policy administration, and composition.

identifying_variation: language-region border shifts work attitudes under shared national policy
observed_margin: job search, benefit use, work attitudes
identifies: current local work or unemployment norms
diagnostic_caution: Local social pressure can be correlated with labor demand, policy administration, and composition.

identifying_variation: wage offers and social visibility change labor-supply acceptance
diagnostic_caution: External validity depends on repeated interaction, observability, and community enforcement.

identifying_variation: group names or category signals change employer callbacks
identifies: structural hierarchy boundary reserved for Week 6
diagnostic_caution: Use Week 6 tools when category membership itself changes access, authority, or protection.
